{{CargoRelic
|name=Medal of Magic Academy
|class_id=20048
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Hogton School of Witchcraft and Wizardry is well-regarded throughout the magic realm. The students who graduated here are skilled at both light and dark magic and have a high probability of becoming noble magic instructors. So if you spot someone wearing one of these medals, greet them with respect!
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail HP +50k<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail DEF +5k<br>Against the Dark Lord, DMG +1000%
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail HP +50k<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail DEF +5k<br>Against the Dark Lord, DMG +1000%
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail HP +50k<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail DEF +5k<br>Against the Dark Lord, DMG +1000%
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail HP +50k<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail DEF +5k<br>Against the Dark Lord, DMG +1000%
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail HP +50k<br>Against the Dark Lord, Snail DEF +5k<br>Against the Dark Lord, DMG +1000%<br> (Awakened)
}}
